title: Retry Workflow Builder and Operator Console MVP
domain: governance, evidence, repair, and operator control
layer: operator approval, receipts, signatures, and key lifecycle
objective: Model, govern, and audit: Retry Workflow Builder → Operator Console MVP.
boundary: Symbolic matter, biochemical/bioelectrical graph, governance, release-evidence, and deployment-engineering modeling only. This phase does not claim medical, neurological, cognitive, diagnostic, treatment, legal compliance, security certification, customer readiness, financial-operation readiness, or autonomous real-world-action approval.
invariants: Computed values cannot be emitted as measured facts.
Predictions remain predictions until separately verified.
Unknown or weak evidence remains unresolved.
High-risk actions require policy, approval, and receipt gates.
Protected traces cannot be silently forgotten.
Secrets must not be materialized into receipts or logs.
Blocked claims stay blocked even when modules succeed.
Demo readiness and production readiness are separate states.

evidence_policy.computed_result_rule: computed results cannot be promoted to measured facts without source-backed evidence
evidence_policy.prediction_rule: predictions remain predictions until separate observation/verification receipts exist
evidence_policy.secret_rule: secret values must never be written into receipts, logs, docs, or exports

implementation_truth: Blueprint phase: metadata, boundary, and traceability are included; implementation modules are intentionally not generated in this scaffold.
upgrade_path: replace scaffold logic with domain-specific implementation
run release evidence gate before promotion

audit_metadata.maintainer_note: All metadata is explicit so future implementations can be audited against the phase contract.

standards_profile.policy_posture: deny by default for high-risk actions and blocked claims
standards_profile.claim_boundary: claim type must be explicit: observed_fact, source_backed_claim, computed_result, symbolic_simulation, prediction, proposal, governance_marker, blocked_claim, unknown
standards_profile.demo_vs_production: demo-ready and production-engineering-ready are separate states
standards_profile.secret_policy: secret values must never be materialized into docs, logs, receipts, or exported evidence
standards_profile.code_style: PEP 8, type hints where useful, pytest tests, src-layout package
standards_profile.docs_style: Markdown docs, JSON metadata, machine-readable registries
